options.name: -clear_twf_attr
options.description: Clears the attributes set on net or pin

options.name: -clock
options.description: Specifies the clock name which caused the timing window on the net or pin

options.name: -clock_edge
options.description: Specifies the capturing clock edge direction: rise or fall

options.name: -fall_delay
options.description: Specifies the fall delay for net or pin

options.name: -fall_slack
options.description: Specifies the fall slack for net or pin

options.name: -fall_slew
options.description: Specifies the fall slew for net or pin

options.name: -reset
options.description: Resets all specified options back to default values

options.name: -rise_delay
options.description: Specifies the rise delay for net or pin

options.name: -rise_slack
options.description: Specifies the rise slack for net or pin

options.name: -rise_slew
options.description: Specifies the rise slew for net or pin

options.name: -shift_arrival_time
options.description: Specifies to filter the idle period of the current waveform in the zero-delay VCD flow. The parameter allows to offset idle period from the TWF delay values

options.name: -type
options.description: Specifies whether the net or pin is part of the clock or data network
